title: The Shepherd and the Wolf
lines: A Shepherd's dog would often run off and play instead of guarding the flock.
One day a Wolf came and killed many sheep while the dog was away playing.
The Shepherd beat the dog severely.
'Why do you beat me?' cried the dog.
'I was only playing for a short while.'
'Your play has cost me many sheep," answered the Shepherd.
'A shepherd's dog has duties that cannot be ignored.'
moral: Those who neglect their responsibilities must face the consequences.
